rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation in the conclusion, where the authors point to prior work on firms' intensive and extensive margin advertising adjustments. It is not used to develop the paper's core theory, hypotheses, identification strategy, or empirical model. The citing paper's main analyses (border strategy demand estimation and supply-side cost evidence) proceed independently of this specific source. Therefore, this citation functions as background/example literature rather than a substantive building block.
